nasb.text: Scarcely had I left them When I found him whom my soul loves; I held on to him and would not let him go Until I had brought him to my mother’s house, And into the room of her who conceived me.”

esv.text: Scarcely had I passed them when I found him whom my soul loves. I held him, and would not let him go until I had brought him into my mother’s house, and into the chamber of her who conceived me.

cnv.text: 我剛剛離開他們， 就遇見我心所愛的； 我把他拉住，不讓他走， 等到我帶他到我母親的家， 進到懷我者的內室。

ccb.text: 我刚离开他们，便找到了我心爱的人。 我拉着他，不让他走； 我把他带回娘家， 到怀我者的卧室。
